case_title: FRED NADERI VS. AIRPORT APPLIANCE INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-31-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF FRED NADERI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRPORT APPLIANCE INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOHN RAYNOR. PLA.INTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NADERI, FRED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIRPORT APPLIANCE INC. $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $290.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
